info.title: Finance App API
info.description:
REST API for personal finance management built with Node.js, Express, Prisma and PostgreSQL.

## Features
- JWT authentication (access + refresh tokens)
- User profile under `/api/users/me`
- Financial transactions with pagination, filters and safe sorting
- Standardized responses: `{ success, message, data }` and errors `{ success, message, code }`
- Rate limiting, CORS, Helmet and ownership checks on protected resources

## Authentication
Protected routes require the header:
`Authorization: Bearer <accessToken>`

Obtain tokens via `POST /api/users` (register) or `POST /api/users/login`. Use `POST /api/users/refresh-token` to renew tokens.

## Notes
- Passwords are never returned in API responses.
- `user_id` in request bodies is ignored; the authenticated user from the JWT is always used.
- Unsupported query parameters (e.g. `categoryId`) return `400 VALIDATION_ERROR`.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Registration, login and token refresh. Rate-limited endpoints.

tags.name: Users
tags.description: Authenticated user profile and balance. Requires Bearer token.

tags.name: Transactions
tags.description: Create, list (paginated), update and delete financial transactions. Requires Bearer token.

tags.name: Dashboard
tags.description: Aggregated financial metrics for the authenticated user. Requires Bearer token.

tags.name: Categories
tags.description: Category management is not available in the current API version. The `categoryId` query filter is rejected with HTTP 400.

get.description: Returns API status, environment, uptime, timestamp and PostgreSQL connectivity. Responds with HTTP 503 when the database is unavailable.
Lightweight status endpoint with links to documentation and health check.

post.description: Creates a user account and returns public profile data with JWT tokens. Password is required in the request but never returned in the response.

application/json.message: Too many requests, please try again later.

post.description: Authenticates with email and password. Returns the same public user shape as registration, including tokens.
Rotates the refresh token: returns a new access/refresh pair and invalidates the previous refresh token immediately. Reusing an old refresh token revokes all active sessions for the user.
Revokes the refresh token sent in the request body. The access token remains valid until it expires.
Revokes every active refresh token session for the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's public profile. Never includes password or token hashes.

application/json.message: You must be logged in to perform this action.

patch.description: Partially updates the authenticated user. Send only fields to change.

delete.description: Permanently deletes the authenticated user and related transactions (cascade).

get.description: Aggregates earnings, expenses, investments and balance for the authenticated user within a date range.

Returns aggregated financial metrics for the authenticated user only. Supports period and category filters. The `categoryId` filter matches the transaction category name until dedicated Category CRUD is available.
Returns paginated transactions for the authenticated user. Supports filters and allowlisted sorting. Unknown query params (e.g. `categoryId`) return 400.

post.description: Creates a transaction for the authenticated user. Any `user_id` sent in the body is ignored.

get.description: Alias of `GET /api/transactions/me` with the same pagination, filters and security.

patch.description: Updates a transaction owned by the authenticated user. Returns 403 if the transaction belongs to another user.

application/json.message: You do not have permission to perform this action.

delete.description: Deletes a transaction owned by the authenticated user.

CategoryIdParam.name: categoryId
CategoryIdParam.description: Not supported on transaction list — returns 400. Use `/api/dashboard` with category name filter instead.

DashboardMonthParam.name: month
DashboardMonthParam.description: Filter by calendar month (1-12). Use with `year` or defaults to current year.

DashboardYearParam.name: year
DashboardYearParam.description: Filter by calendar year. Can be combined with `month`.

DashboardCategoryIdParam.name: categoryId
DashboardCategoryIdParam.description: Filter by category name (transaction name) until Category CRUD is available.

code.description: Machine-readable error code (e.g. VALIDATION_ERROR, UNAUTHORIZED, FORBIDDEN, NOT_FOUND, EMAIL_ALREADY_IN_USE, TOO_MANY_REQUESTS)

requestId.description: Correlation ID for the request (also sent as X-Request-Id header).

UserResponse.description: Public user profile — never includes password or token hashes.

AuthTokens.description: JWT tokens returned only on register/login/refresh — not stored in user profile responses.

PaginatedResponse.description: Generic paginated success envelope with meta at root level.

password.description: Sent in request only — never returned in responses
